source: How to Train BERT with an Academic Budget.pdf

concepts.finding:
Overall, our ﬁndings demonstrate
that, with the right recipe, large language models
can indeed be trained in an academic setting.1
2
Problem Setup
We investigate the task of pretraining a large lan-
guage model under computational constraints.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

However, their pretraining phase can be
prohibitively expensive for startups and academic
research groups, limiting the research and devel-
opment of model pretraining to only a few well-
funded industry labs.

concepts.finding:
Moreover,
we conduct an extensive hyperparmeter search tai-
lored to our resource budget, and ﬁnd that synchro-
nizing the learning rate warmup and decay schedule
with our 24 hour budget greatly improves model
performance.

Hyperparameter Search

model performance in deep learning and NLP
(Levy et al., 2015; Liu et al., 2019).
